creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
gnats-admin@FreeBSD.org once wrote:

> >Category:       ports
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports
> >Synopsis:       Siag port upgraded to 3.1.17
> >Arrival-Date:   Tue Jun 22 15:10:01 PDT 1999

Siag just went to 3.1.18, but it  should not distruct us :) There are no
major improvements, nor  bug fixes, it seems. Mostly  alterations to the
build process, which make ndbm and guile optional even if present on the
system.

	-mi
